title: Amtech M1590 5 Piece circular hole saw set
features: DURABLE: These circular hole saws are made from hardened carbon steel and are supplied with a mandrel
FOR CUTTING SMALL HOLES: Ideal for installing locks and other small hole boring, the set can cut holes between 32 - 54mm diameter
VERSATILE: They are suitable for cutting wood, plastic ,aluminium and thin mild steel
WORKSHOP FRIENDLY: Ideal for home use or trade environments
STABLE OPERATION: Designed to minimise movement during cutting tasks
description: Product Description Amtech have a fantastic range of essential tools for all your DIY requirements. Great value prices are coupled with a very compelling 3 year product guarantee. So keep your home, garage and garden looking great and well maintained for less! Don’t forget to also take advantage of Amtech’s free product advice service – see pack for more details. Please note that Amtech warranty and service terms are only applicable to genuine Amtech products. Safety Warning No Box Contains 5x Carbon Steel Hole Saw with 1x Mandrel See more
